scripts.allure:clean: if exist allure-results rmdir /s /q allure-results & mkdir allure-results
scripts.allure:history:restore: if exist allure-history\history xcopy /E /I /Y allure-history\history allure-results\history
scripts.test: npm run allure:clean && npm run allure:history:restore && npm run environment:generate && npm run bddgen && npm run executor:generate && playwright test
scripts.allure:history:save: if exist allure-report\history (rimraf allure-history\history && xcopy /E /I /Y allure-report\history allure-history\history)
scripts.reports: npm run allure:generate && npm run dashboard:generate && npm run allure:generate:single &&npm run dashboard:build  && npm run dashboard:standalone && npm run allure:history:save
